text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Sync core source files from indy-mobileapps to mobile-apps","description":"Copy the following from /Users/ggomes/dev/indy-mobileapps/ to /Users/ggomes/dev/indy-frontend/mobile-apps/:

1. dev-server/adjustments/css/ - ALL files (indy-mobileapps has more: checkout-fixes.css, membership-fixes.css)
2. dev-server/adjustments/js/ - ALL files (indy-mobileapps has tab-navigation.js which mobile-apps is missing)
3. dev-server/build.js and dev-server/server.js
4. src/capacitor-init.ts (indy-mobileapps version is newer/larger)
5. src/plugins/ - use indy-mobileapps versions (mobile-apps has extra indyMobileAdjustmentsExample.ts that should be REMOVED)
6. scripts/configure-capacitor-app.sh (indy-mobileapps version is newer)
7. scripts/finalize-to-bundle.js (missing from mobile-apps, exists in indy-mobileapps)
8. scripts/screenshot.sh (missing from mobile-apps)
9. scripts/logo-config.json (use indy-mobileapps version)
10. ios/ directory - copy from indy-mobileapps (the Swift plugins, Info.plist, etc.)
11. android/ directory - copy from indy-mobileapps
12. www/ directory - indy-mobileapps has adjustments subfolder, sync it
13. package.json - use indy-mobileapps version (has more scripts)
14. package-lock.json - use indy-mobileapps version
15. Gemfile and Gemfile.lock - use indy-mobileapps versions
16. capacitor.config.json - use indy-mobileapps version
17. .gitignore - use indy-mobileapps version
18. fastlane/ directory
19. github-workflows/ directory
20. icons/ directory
21. build_number.txt
22. .ruby-version
23. src-cordova/ directory

Use cp -R for directories. For individual files, use cp. Overwrite existing files.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT copy any of these AI/agent-related files:
- CLAUDE.md, WARP.md, AGENTS.md, PLANNING.md, TASKS.md
- .claude/ directory, .mcp.json
- Any .md files in root except legitimate project docs
- tests/ directory
- playwright.config.js, run-tests.sh, test-cinepolis.sh
- auto_debug.sh, debug_workflow.sh
- .playwright-mcp/
- logs/
- screenshots/ (in root)
- Any *.backup files

After copying, remove these files from mobile-apps that shouldn't exist:
- src/plugins/indyMobileAdjustmentsExample.ts
- test-date-picker-complete.js
- test-showtimes-navigation.js
- navigate-to-showtimes.swift
- sync-android.sh (if indy-mobileapps doesn't have meaningful changes)
- capacitor-migration-notes.md
- ACT_SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS.md","assignedBy":"file-syncer","timestamp":"2026-03-06T17:52:46.306Z"}
